content:
# How to Create AI-Generated Podcasts from Scripts in 2026

Starting a podcast doesn't require expensive equipment or recording time. AI tools can turn your scripts into professional podcasts!

Explore our [[link:/category/Audio|Audio category]] for more tools.

---

## Step 1: Write Your Script

Start with a well-structured podcast script. Use [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] for help brainstorming and structuring your content.

**Try Rytr**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## Step 2: Generate the Audio

Use Murf AI or [[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]] to convert your script to natural-sounding speech.

### Murf AI for Podcasts
- **Natural voices**: Human-sounding AI narration
- **Multiple speakers**: Add variety to your podcast
- **Customizable**: Adjust speed, pitch, and pauses

### ElevenLabs for Podcasts
- **Emotional voices**: Add tone and expression
- **Voice cloning**: Create consistent podcast hosts
- **High quality**: Professional audio output

**Try ElevenLabs**: {{AFFILIATE_ELEVENLABS}}

---

## Step 3: Edit and Enhance

Use [[link:/tools/79|Descript]] to edit your podcast like a document — cut, add, and polish with text-based editing.

**Try Descript**: https://descript.com

---

## Step 4: Add Music and Effects

Use Suno to generate intro and outro music that fits your podcast's theme.

**Try Suno**: https://suno.ai

---

## Our AI Podcast Creation Toolkit

| Task | Tool | Affiliate |
|------|------|-----------|
| Script writing | [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] | Yes |
| Voice generation | [[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]] | Yes |
| Audio editing | [[link:/tools/79|Descript]] | No |
| Music | Suno | No |

Ready to create your AI-generated podcast? Start with these tools today!

For more insights, check out Best AI Podcasting Tools for Beginners
